service.description: Universal Solver Fabric â€” agnostic optimization capability layer that discovers, selects, and executes optimization solvers with replay-safe evidence, deterministic provenance, and zero manual configuration.

supported_operations.description: Discover available solver capabilities matching query criteria including problem type, constraints, and resource requirements.
Execute an optimization problem through the solver fabric. Automatically selects the best solver unless overridden. Produces replay-safe evidence.
Query the health status of a registered solver.

determinism_guarantees.note: Given identical inputs and solver seed, results are identical. Selection ranking is deterministic.

replay_guarantees.note: Every execution produces a replay-safe evidence package containing all state necessary for exact reconstruction.

evidence_guarantees.note: Every execution generates a signed evidence package chained to the previous execution.

contracts.description: Discover available solver capabilities matching query criteria including problem type, constraints, and resource requirements.
Execute an optimization problem through the solver fabric. Automatically selects the best solver unless overridden. Produces replay-safe evidence.
Query the health status of a registered solver.

service.description: QCG Trust Verification â€” Hybrid Quantum Communication Gateway providing replay verification, trust validation, deterministic execution, and Byzantine consensus as a canonical platform capability.

supported_operations.description: Verify that a message has not been replayed (duplicate/stale detection) and assign a monotonic sequence number.

issued_at.description: Unix timestamp of when the message was issued

supported_operations.description: Validate producer identity, ECDSA signature, and authorization against the trust registry.
Execute a contract through the blind runtime core producing a deterministic ACK and runtime hash.
Run Byzantine consensus across multiple nodes to verify execution validity.

determinism_guarantees.note: RuntimeCore processes every contract through an identical code path. Given identical inputs, the ACK and runtime_hash are identical.

replay_guarantees.note: CanonicalReplayAuthority is the sole replay authority. All replay state is persisted and deterministic.
